options.a: following a disturbance from the equilibrium condition, a force and/or moment is generated that tends to increase the effects of that disturbance.
options.b: following a disturbance from the equilibrium condition, a force and/or moment is generated that tends to counter the effects of that disturbance.
options.c: the amplitude of the oscillatory motion of an aeroplane tends to increase over time.
options.d: the amplitude of the oscillatory motion of an aeroplane tends to decrease over time.
